dict.string:
Cookery AI uses the following open-source software and services:
SwiftUI License: Apple Software License https://developer.apple.com/documentation/swiftui
StoreKit License: Apple Software License https://developer.apple.com/documentation/storekit
UserNotifications License: Apple Software License https://developer.apple.com/documentation/usernotifications
AuthenticationServices License: Apple Software License https://developer.apple.com/documentation/authenticationservices
Unsplash API License: Unsplash API License https://unsplash.com/developers
Google AI Studio License: Google Terms of Service https://ai.google.dev/
Supabase License: MIT License https://supabase.com
